posts.author: norawa (Nora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us live on April 28
11:00 EDT | 16:00 BST
Register here

We will be covering this month’s new features releases for monday’s work management product:

Boards
Sync granular board permissions with managed templates
Item ID - custom key
Group by formula
Sorting by group
Views - allow to pin multiple views.

Workforms
Prefilled values
Post submission flow

monday AI
AI columns - updates as input

2025-04-28T15:00:00Z
